features: 🎧 【Immersive Stereo Surround Sound】Experience next-level audio with a 50mm titanium-coated dynamic driver of SKAPENDY wirless gaming headphone that delivers enhanced 3D stereo sound. Hear every detail—teammates' voices, footsteps, and precise in-game effects—giving you the edge you need to win.

⚡ 【Low-Latency Wireless Performance】Enjoy smooth, stable audio with <20ms latency in 2.4GHz mode and <48ms in Bluetooth mode on the VK81 gaming headset for PS5. Experience precise, responsive sound—perfect for fast-paced games and immersive entertainment.

🎮 【Multi-Platform Wireless Compatibility】SKAPENDY pc gaming headset is used with 2.4GHz dongle mode with PS5, PS4, PC, Switch, Mac, and laptops. Press the mic button for 2 seconds to switch to Bluetooth mode, compatible with phones, tablets, laptops, and Switch.⚠️ Not compatible with Xbox.⚠️ Microphone not supported on Switch.⚠️ Bluetooth mode not supported on PS4/PS5.

💺 【Comfort-Focused Ergonomic Design】The blue gaming headset weighing only 0.66 lbs, the foldable headset features soft, breathable leather ear cushions that reduce pressure and physically block up to 85% ambient noise—comfortable even during long sessions or glasses use.

🔋 【Long-Lasting Battery Life】Equipped with a 1200mAh battery, enjoy up to 50 hours of listening on this gaming headset for PS4 (40 hours with RGB). A 2.5-hour USB-C fast charge keeps you powered through long music, meetings, or gaming marathons.
✨ 【Soft RGB Lighting】SKAPENDY over-ear Bluetooth headphones with dynamic RGB lighting enhances your setup with subtle yet stylish visual effects—ideal for late-night gaming, recording, or streaming.
🎁 This premium bluetooth headset makes the perfect gift for Christmas & birthdays, delighting boys, girls, family, and friends alike.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 50mm Dynamic Drivers 2 ENC Noise Cancelling Tech 3 Long Gaming Time Previous page LIGHTWEIGHT WELL BUILT For PC Independent Exploration Enjoy the Fantastic Gaming Time GIRLS' FREELY SPARETIME Experience The Most Shocking Stereo Sound Enjoy The Most Touching Movie WEEKEND TIME Immersive Gaming: Cheerful and Stimulating Specific Uses for PS4/PS5/Switch/Mobile Next page Previous page Next page 1 Coole RGB-LIGHT 2 Foldable Headset 3 Adjustable Headset Is VK81 wireless headset compatible with Xbox Series X? The Skapendy VK81 wireless gaming headset is not compatible with Xbox Series X or other Xbox Series consoles. I have two headphones. Can I use both USB connections at the same time? Will the signals interfere with each other? Yes, but it’s not recommended to use them simultaneously. Each headset works as a separate audio device, so there won’t be signal interference. Can I also use the headset's microphone on PS4/PS5 to talk with my team in Fortnite? Absolutely! The headset works great on PS4 and PS5, and you can chat with your teammates clearly using the mic. How’s the voice quality when chatting in games? I’m thinking of buying it as a gift. The headset sounds great! Voice chats are clear and natural, and it’s comfortable—an excellent gift for gamers. When this headser connects to Nintendo, can I use the microphone to talk to my teammates? No, you can't talk, but you can hear the game sound.
